h1: Best Bit Manipulation Questions for Amazon
intro: A curated set of 9 Bit Manipulation problems frequently useful for Amazon interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Bit Manipulation problems should I do for Amazon?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 9 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Bit Manipulation topic page and related roadmaps.
